completed_slice: Created and source-verified a reversible, dependency-free interactive artwork titled The Unreliable Observatory, with a distinct identity contract and static contract tests.

progress.verification: Committed source fetched through GitHub and inspected; four contract-equivalent Node tests passed locally. Direct fresh-checkout execution was blocked by DNS/network egress.

remaining_required_evidence: public URL serving the committed source or a descendant
served commit or immutable deployment identity
real mobile viewport screenshot or interaction recording
direct execution of the committed contract test in CI or a fresh checkout
next_action: Add an independent static-host deployment workflow and deployment identity file, then capture a mobile proof without changing the site's non-commercial identity.
rollback: Revert the source, identity, and test commits in reverse order; retain Git history.
